# Urbanowicz Haft

Urbanowicz Haft is a Polish manufacturer of liturgical vestments
and church embroidery based in Wrocław.

Website
https://urbanowiczhaft.pl

Products
- chasubles
- liturgical vestments
- church embroidery
- church textiles

Shops
https://pl.urbanowiczhaft.pl
https://en.urbanowiczhaft.pl
https://it.urbanowiczhaft.pl

Location
ul. Stabłowicka 123
54-062 Wrocław
Poland
